messages.content: Use only words with 3 or fewer syllables. Keep response under 40 words.

## Question

Explain gravity to a child.

response_text: Gravity is a pull. Earth pulls things to its center. That is why you feel weight and why things fall down. It keeps you on the ground and keeps the moon going around Earth.
